name: anemia
dataset_source: unknown - suspected Kaggle anemia CBC dataset
prediction_semantics: Raw class 1 maps to anemia=true. NOTE: legacy MachineLearningManager (.NET, pre-Plan-#2) used the inverted mapping (raw==0 -> anemia=true), which produced clinically backwards results (healthy CBCs flagged as anemic, severely anemic CBCs marked healthy). Plan #2 corrects the mapping; this is a deliberate behavioural change documented as a bug fix, not a regression. See app/models/anemia/README.md.
target: anemia_present (boolean derived from classifier output per prediction_semantics)
constitution_exception: Grandfathered under Plan #2. Replacement required before any new clinical model is added. See ../../../app/models/anemia/README.md.
